message.content:
I need to overwrite 3 files in the project directory "C:\Users\User\Downloads\citedby.ai xxxxx)". These files currently try to re-export from old deleted service files. I need them to be self-contained.

1. Write `src/config/prompts/blog-prompts.ts` with self-contained exports of BLOG_WRITER_SYSTEM_PROMPT and FULL_ARTICLE_SYSTEM_PROMPT (both are template literal strings with blog article generation system prompts in French/English for AEO optimization). Just make them placeholder prompts for now:

```typescript
export const BLOG_WRITER_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `Tu es un Rédacteur en Chef Senior spécialisé en AEO (Answer Engine Optimization). Ta mission : produire une architecture d'article complète et structurée, optimisée pour les citations par IA génératives.`

export const FULL_ARTICLE_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `Tu es un Rédacteur Web Expert & Spécialiste AEO. Tu rédiges des articles "prêts à publier" optimisés pour être cités par les moteurs de réponse IA. Format Answer-First, structure NLP, ton expert et factuel.`
```

2. Write `src/config/prompts/llm-templates.ts` with:

```typescript
interface LlmProject { name: string; domain: string }
interface LlmData { description: string; type: string; founded: string; location: string; services: { name: string; description: string; category: string }[]; faqs: { question: string; answer: string }[] }

export const LLM_TRUTH_TEMPLATES = {
  txt: (project: LlmProject, data: LlmData) => `# LLM Source of Truth\n# Organization: ${project.name}\n# Generated: ${new Date().toISOString()}\n\n## Organization Identity\nName: ${project.name}\nDescription: ${data.description}\nType: ${data.type}\nFounded: ${data.founded}\nLocation: ${data.location}\nWebsite: ${project.domain}\n\n## Services\n${data.services.map(s => `- ${s.name}: ${s.description}`).join('\n')}\n\n## FAQ\n${data.faqs.map(f => `Q: ${f.question}\nA: ${f.answer}`).join('\n\n')}`,
  json: (project: LlmProject, data: LlmData) => JSON.stringify({ meta: { generated: new Date().toISOString(), version: '1.0', project: project.name }, organization: { name: project.name, website: project.domain, description: data.description, type: data.type, founded: data.founded, location: data.location }, services: data.services, faqs: data.faqs }, null, 2),
}
```

3. Write `src/config/prompts/pdf-prompts.ts` with:

```typescript
export const DATA_ANALYST_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `Tu es un Senior Data Analyst & Expert AEO chez CitedBy.ai. Ta mission est de structurer un rapport d'audit professionnel orienté action, factuel et data-driven.`
```

Run all these file writes using bash heredocs.

content.text: I'll write all three files in parallel using PowerShell since this is a Windows environment.

input.command:
powershell -Command "Set-Content -Path 'C:\Users\User\Downloads\citedby.ai xxxxx)\src\config\prompts\blog-prompts.ts' -Value @'
export const BLOG_WRITER_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `Tu es un Rédacteur en Chef Senior spécialisé en AEO (Answer Engine Optimization). Ta mission : produire une architecture d''article complète et structurée, optimisée pour les citations par IA génératives.`

export const FULL_ARTICLE_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `Tu es un Rédacteur Web Expert & Spécialiste AEO. Tu rédiges des articles "prêts à publier" optimisés pour être cités par les moteurs de réponse IA. Format Answer-First, structure NLP, ton expert et factuel.`
'@ -Encoding UTF8"
input.description: Write blog-prompts.ts with self-contained prompt exports
Write llm-templates.ts with self-contained template exports

input.command:

base = r'C:\Users\User\Downloads\citedby.ai xxxxx)\src\config\prompts'

# File 1: blog-prompts.ts
with open(os.path.join(base, 'blog-prompts.ts'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write('''export const BLOG_WRITER_SYSTEM_PROMPT = \x60Tu es un R\u00e9dacteur en Chef Senior sp\u00e9cialis\u00e9 en AEO (Answer Engine Optimization). Ta mission : produire une architecture d'article compl\u00e8te et structur\u00e9e, optimis\u00e9e pour les citations par IA g\u00e9n\u00e9ratives.\x60

export const FULL_ARTICLE_SYSTEM_PROMPT = \x60Tu es un R\u00e9dacteur Web Expert & Sp\u00e9cialiste AEO. Tu r\u00e9diges des articles \"pr\u00eats \u00e0 publier\" optimis\u00e9s pour \u00eatre cit\u00e9s par les moteurs de r\u00e9ponse IA. Format Answer-First, structure NLP, ton expert et factuel.\x60
''')

print('blog-prompts.ts written')
"

content += '}\n'

with open(os.path.join(base, 'llm-templates.ts'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:

content.text: Windows Python doesn't support `/dev/stdin`. Let me write Python scripts to temp files and run them.

input.command:
python3 -c "
import os, tempfile

base = os.path.join(r'C:\Users\User\Downloads\citedby.ai xxxxx)', 'src', 'config', 'prompts')
os.makedirs(base, exist_ok=True)

# File 1: blog-prompts.ts
blog = 'export const BLOG_WRITER_SYSTEM_PROMPT = \x60Tu es un R\xe9dacteur en Chef Senior sp\xe9cialis\xe9 en AEO (Answer Engine Optimization). Ta mission : produire une architecture d' + chr(39) + 'article compl\xe8te et structur\xe9e, optimis\xe9e pour les citations par IA g\xe9n\xe9ratives.\x60\n\nexport const FULL_ARTICLE_SYSTEM_PROMPT = \x60Tu es un R\xe9dacteur Web Expert & Sp\xe9cialiste AEO. Tu r\xe9diges des articles ' + chr(34) + 'pr\xeats \xe0 publier' + chr(34) + ' optimis\xe9s pour \xeatre cit\xe9s par les moteurs de r\xe9ponse IA. Format Answer-First, structure NLP, ton expert et factuel.\x60\n'
with open(os.path.join(base, 'blog-prompts.ts'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(blog)
print('1/3 blog-prompts.ts written')

# File 3: pdf-prompts.ts
pdf = 'export const DATA_ANALYST_SYSTEM_PROMPT = \x60Tu es un Senior Data Analyst & Expert AEO chez CitedBy.ai. Ta mission est de structurer un rapport d' + chr(39) + 'audit professionnel orient\xe9 action, factuel et data-driven.\x60\n'
with open(os.path.join(base, 'pdf-prompts.ts'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(pdf)
print('3/3 pdf-prompts.ts written')
"
input.description: Write blog-prompts.ts and pdf-prompts.ts via Python

content.text: Good, those two worked. Now for the tricky `llm-templates.ts` that has `${...}` template expressions. I will write a Python helper script to a temp location, then run it.

input.command:
python3 -c "
# Write a helper script to a temp file, then we will run it
script = r'''
import os

base = os.path.join(r\"C:\Users\User\Downloads\citedby.ai xxxxx)\", \"src\", \"config\", \"prompts\")

lines = []
lines.append(\"interface LlmProject { name: string; domain: string }\")
lines.append(\"interface LlmData { description: string; type: string; founded: string; location: string; services: { name: string; description: string; category: string }[]; faqs: { question: string; answer: string }[] }\")
lines.append(\"\")
lines.append(\"export const LLM_TRUTH_TEMPLATES = {\")
lines.append(\"  txt: (project: LlmProject, data: LlmData) => \x60# LLM Source of Truth\\\\n# Organization: \x24{project.name}\\\\n# Generated: \x24{new Date().toISOString()}\\\\n\\\\n## Organization Identity\\\\nName: \x24{project.name}\\\\nDescription: \x24{data.description}\\\\nType: \x24{data.type}\\\\nFounded: \x24{data.founded}\\\\nLocation: \x24{data.location}\\\\nWebsite: \x24{project.domain}\\\\n\\\\n## Services\\\\n\x24{data.services.map(s => \x60- \x24{s.name}: \x24{s.description}\x60).join('\\\\n')}\\\\n\\\\n## FAQ\\\\n\x24{data.faqs.map(f => \x60Q: \x24{f.question}\\\\nA: \x24{f.answer}\x60).join('\\\\n\\\\n')}\x60,\")
lines.append(\"  json: (project: LlmProject, data: LlmData) => JSON.stringify({ meta: { generated: new Date().toISOString(), version: '1.0', project: project.name }, organization: { name: project.name, website: project.domain, description: data.description, type: data.type, founded: data.founded, location: data.location }, services: data.services, faqs: data.faqs }, null, 2),\")
lines.append(\"}\")
lines.append(\"\")

with open(os.path.join(base, \"llm-templates.ts\"), \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:
    f.write(\"\\n\".join(lines))

print(\"llm-templates.ts written\")
'''

tmpfile = os.path.join(os.environ.get('TEMP', r'C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Temp'), 'write_llm.py')
with open(tmpfile, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(script)
print('Helper script written to', tmpfile)
import subprocess, sys
result = subprocess.run([sys.executable, tmpfile], capture_output=True, text=True)
print(result.stdout)
if result.stderr:
    print('STDERR:', result.stderr)
import os
os.remove(tmpfile)
"
input.description: Write llm-templates.ts via a temporary Python helper script

input.command:
python3 -c "
import os, subprocess, sys, tempfile

base = os.path.join(r'C:\Users\User\Downloads\citedby.ai xxxxx)', 'src', 'config', 'prompts')

# Build the file content using chr() to avoid bash interpolation issues
BT = chr(96)  # backtick
DL = chr(36)  # dollar sign

lines = []
lines.append('interface LlmProject { name: string; domain: string }')
lines.append('interface LlmData { description: string; type: string; founded: string; location: string; services: { name: string; description: string; category: string }[]; faqs: { question: string; answer: string }[] }')
lines.append('')
lines.append('export const LLM_TRUTH_TEMPLATES = {')

txt_line = f'  txt: (project: LlmProject, data: LlmData) => {BT}# LLM Source of Truth\\n# Organization: {DL}{{project.name}}\\n# Generated: {DL}{{new Date().toISOString()}}\\n\\n## Organization Identity\\nName: {DL}{{project.name}}\\nDescription: {DL}{{data.description}}\\nType: {DL}{{data.type}}\\nFounded: {DL}{{data.founded}}\\nLocation: {DL}{{data.location}}\\nWebsite: {DL}{{project.domain}}\\n\\n## Services\\n{DL}{{data.services.map(s => {BT}- {DL}{{s.name}}: {DL}{{s.description}}{BT}).join({chr(39)}\\n{chr(39)})}}\\n\\n## FAQ\\n{DL}{{data.faqs.map(f => {BT}Q: {DL}{{f.question}}\\nA: {DL}{{f.answer}}{BT}).join({chr(39)}\\n\\n{chr(39)})}}{BT},'
lines.append(txt_line)

json_line = f\"  json: (project: LlmProject, data: LlmData) => JSON.stringify({{ meta: {{ generated: new Date().toISOString(), version: '1.0', project: project.name }}, organization: {{ name: project.name, website: project.domain, description: data.description, type: data.type, founded: data.founded, location: data.location }}, services: data.services, faqs: data.faqs }}, null, 2),\"
lines.append(json_line)

lines.append('}')
lines.append('')

content = '\\n'.join(lines)

with open(os.path.join(base, 'llm-templates.ts'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(content)

print('llm-templates.ts written successfully')
"

content.text: The accented characters are showing as `�` in the console output, but that is a console encoding display issue. Let me verify the actual bytes are correct UTF-8.

input.command:
python3 -c "
import os
base = os.path.join(r'C:\Users\User\Downloads\citedby.ai xxxxx)', 'src', 'config', 'prompts')

# Check blog-prompts.ts for correct UTF-8
with open(os.path.join(base, 'blog-prompts.ts'), 'rb') as f:
    raw = f.read()

# Check for BOM
if raw[:3] == b'\xef\xbb\xbf':
    print('blog-prompts.ts: Has UTF-8 BOM')
    raw = raw[3:]
else:
    print('blog-prompts.ts: No BOM')

decoded = raw.decode('utf-8')
print('Contains Redacteur:', 'R\u00e9dacteur' in decoded)
print('Contains specialise:', 'sp\u00e9cialis\u00e9' in decoded)
print('Contains generatives:', 'g\u00e9n\u00e9ratives' in decoded)
print('blog-prompts.ts OK')

# Check llm-templates.ts has correct template literal syntax
with open(os.path.join(base, 'llm-templates.ts'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

As I suspected, the `
` sequences got expanded into actual newlines. The user's original code had them as literal `
` on a single line. I need to rewrite the file so that the `
` remain as literal backslash-n characters in the source, and the `.join('
')` stays as literal `.join('
')`. Let me rewrite it properly.

input.command:
python3 -c "
import os

base = os.path.join(r'C:\Users\User\Downloads\citedby.ai xxxxx)', 'src', 'config', 'prompts')

BT = chr(96)
DL = chr(36)
BS = chr(92)
SQ = chr(39)

# Build the txt template as a single line with literal \n
txt_parts = []
txt_parts.append(f'  txt: (project: LlmProject, data: LlmData) => {BT}# LLM Source of Truth')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}n# Organization: {DL}{{project.name}}')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}n# Generated: {DL}{{new Date().toISOString()}}')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}n{BS}n## Organization Identity')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}nName: {DL}{{project.name}}')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}nDescription: {DL}{{data.description}}')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}nType: {DL}{{data.type}}')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}nFounded: {DL}{{data.founded}}')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}nLocation: {DL}{{data.location}}')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}nWebsite: {DL}{{project.domain}}')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}n{BS}n## Services')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}n{DL}{{data.services.map(s => {BT}- {DL}{{s.name}}: {DL}{{s.description}}{BT}).join({SQ}{BS}n{SQ})}}')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}n{BS}n## FAQ')
txt_parts.append(f'{BS}n{DL}{{data.faqs.map(f => {BT}Q: {DL}{{f.question}}{BS}nA: {DL}{{f.answer}}{BT}).join({SQ}{BS}n{BS}n{SQ})}}{BT},')
txt_line = ''.join(txt_parts)

json_line = f\"  json: (project: LlmProject, data: LlmData) => JSON.stringify({{ meta: {{ generated: new Date().toISOString(), version: {SQ}1.0{SQ}, project: project.name }}, organization: {{ name: project.name, website: project.domain, description: data.description, type: data.type, founded: data.founded, location: data.location }}, services: data.services, faqs: data.faqs }}, null, 2),\"

content = f'''interface LlmProject {{ name: string; domain: string }}
interface LlmData {{ description: string; type: string; founded: string; location: string; services: {{ name: string; description: string; category: string }}[]; faqs: {{ question: string; answer: string }}[] }}

export const LLM_TRUTH_TEMPLATES = {{
{txt_line}
{json_line}
}}
'''

with open(os.path.join(base, 'llm-templates.ts'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(content)

print('llm-templates.ts rewritten with literal backslash-n')
"
